channel.title: GitHub PHP Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of PHP in GitHub

item.title: snipe/snipe-it
item.description: A free open source IT asset/license management system

item.title: filamentphp/filament
item.description: A collection of beautiful full-stack components for Laravel. The perfect starting point for your next app. Using Livewire, Alpine.js and Tailwind CSS.

item.title: PHP-CS-Fixer/PHP-CS-Fixer
item.description: A tool to automatically fix PHP Coding Standards issues

item.title: leokhoa/laragon
item.description: Laragon is a portable, isolated, fast & powerful universal development environment for PHP, Node.js, Python, Java, Go, Ruby. It is fast, lightweight, easy-to-use and easy-to-extend.

item.title: symfony/symfony
item.description: The Symfony PHP framework

item.title: rectorphp/rector
item.description: Instant Upgrades and Automated Refactoring of any PHP 5.3+ code

item.title: pestphp/pest
item.description: Pest is an elegant PHP testing Framework with a focus on simplicity, meticulously designed to bring back the joy of testing in PHP.

item.title: bagisto/bagisto
item.description: Free and open source laravel eCommerce platform

item.title: Sylius/Sylius
item.description: Open Source eCommerce Framework on Symfony

item.title: nextcloud/all-in-one
item.description: 📦 The official Nextcloud installation method. Provides easy deployment and maintenance with most features included in this one Nextcloud instance.

item.title: PHPOffice/PhpSpreadsheet
item.description: A pure PHP library for reading and writing spreadsheet files

item.title: bezhanSalleh/filament-shield
item.description: The easiest and most intuitive way to add access management to your Filament Panel; Resources, Pages & Widgets through `spatie/laravel-permission`

item.title: magento/magento2
item.description: Prior to making any Submission(s), you must sign an Adobe Contributor License Agreement, available here at: https://opensource.adobe.com/cla.html. All Submissions you make to Adobe Inc. and its affiliates, assigns and subsidiaries (collectively “Adobe”) are subject to the terms of the Adobe Contributor License Agreement.

item.title: shopware/shopware
item.description: Shopware 6 is an open commerce platform based on Symfony Framework and Vue and supported by a worldwide community and more than 1.500 community extensions

item.title: MISP/MISP
item.description: MISP (core software) - Open Source Threat Intelligence and Sharing Platform

item.title: pterodactyl/panel
item.description: Pterodactyl® is a free, open-source game server management panel built with PHP, React, and Go. Designed with security in mind, Pterodactyl runs all game servers in isolated Docker containers while exposing a beautiful and intuitive UI to end users.

item.title: librenms/librenms
item.description: Community-based GPL-licensed network monitoring system

item.title: roundcube/roundcubemail
item.description: The Roundcube Webmail suite

item.title: doctrine/orm
item.description: Doctrine Object Relational Mapper (ORM)

item.title: matomo-org/matomo
item.description: Empowering People Ethically with the leading open source alternative to Google Analytics that gives you full control over your data. Matomo lets you easily collect data from websites & apps and visualise this data and extract insights. Privacy is built-in. Liberating Web Analytics. Star us on Github? +1. And we love Pull Requests!

item.title: DataDog/dd-trace-php
item.description: Datadog PHP Clients

item.title: livewire/livewire
item.description: A full-stack framework for Laravel that takes the pain out of building dynamic UIs.
